licenses.term_of_service:
# Terms and Conditions for the Daily Tasks Application

Welcome to the Daily Tasks app! To ensure a safe and effective user experience, please carefully read and understand the
following terms and conditions. These are important
regulations covering copyright, usage rights, advertising, and user data privacy. The mDev developer is committed to
providing a useful and reliable application for the user
community. If you have any questions or suggestions, please contact us using the information at the end of the page.
Thank you for choosing and using our Daily Tasks

## Copyright

The Daily Tasks application is the intellectual property of mDev. All intellectual property rights in the application,
including but not limited to source code, user interface,
content, and information, are owned by mDev.

## Terms

* The application refers to the Daily Tasks application developed and provided by mDev.
* The developer is mDev, the individual who owns and develops the application.
* The user is any individual or organization using the application.

## Developer's Responsibility

The developer commits to making every effort to provide the Daily Tasks application safely and efficiently. However,
mDev cannot guarantee that the application will always function
normally or be error-free. If you encounter any issues with the application, please contact the developer for
assistance.

## Advertising

The application may display ads created by third parties. Users agree to view ads while using the application. The
developer is not responsible for the content or any damages
arising from viewing ads.

## User Data

The Daily Tasks application may collect user data, which is used to improve the application and provide advertising
services.

* User data will be stored in the cloud and on the device simultaneously.
* Data may be encrypted or not, depending on the importance of the data.
* Please refer to the Privacy Policy for more details.

## Privacy Policy

mDev respects the user's privacy. The privacy policy of the Daily Tasks application describes how the developer
collects, uses, and anonymously shares data regarding the use of the
application. Please refer to the privacy policy for more information.

## Limitation of Liability

The developer is not responsible for any damages arising from the use of the Daily Tasks application, including but not
limited to the following:

* Property damage, including but not limited to damage to devices, data, or income.
* Health damage, including but not limited to physical or mental harm.
* Damage from the use of third-party services, including but not limited to copyright infringement, intellectual
  property infringement, or legal violations.
* The developer also does not guarantee or intervene in third-party services. Please see the "Software License" section
  for more information.

## Changes to Terms of Use

The developer may change these terms of use at any time. Users should regularly check the terms of use for the latest
updates.

## Contact Information

If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact mDev via email: mvinhle22@gmail.com.
licenses.privacy_policy:
# Daily Tasks Application Privacy Policy

We value your privacy. This privacy policy describes how we collect, use, and share your data when you use the Daily
Tasks application.

## Terms

* The application refers to the Daily Tasks application developed and provided by mDev.
* The developer is mDev, the individual who owns and develops the application.
* The user is any individual or organization using the application.

## User Data Collection:

* Activity Data: This includes information about how the application is used, such as tasks performed, usage time, and
  device information. Activity data is collected anonymously,
  meaning it cannot be traced or identified to users. This data is used by the developer to optimize the application.
* Generated Data: This includes information created when using the application, such as user-generated content or
  comments and posts. Generated data may be traceable to users. This
  data is used for personalizing the application and advertising.

## Use of Data for Purposes:

* Improve the Application: We use activity data and generated data to enhance the application, such as adding new
  features or fixing errors.
* Provide Advertising Services: We may share activity data with third parties to provide targeted advertising services.

## Data Sharing:

* Activity Data: We may share activity data with third parties to provide targeted advertising services (via advertising
  identifier on the device).
* Generated Data: We do not share generated data with third parties.

## Personal Information:

* The developer may store your personal information, such as name, email address, and phone number.
* Personal information is not shared with third parties.
* After you delete your account, all your data, including generated data, will be erased.

## User Rights:

Users have the right to access, edit, or delete their generated data. To exercise this right, please access the Daily
Tasks app, go to Personal Information (Profile), and choose
Delete Account (May take additional time to complete the deletion).

## Changes to Privacy Policy:

We may change this privacy policy at any time. You should regularly check the privacy policy for the latest updates.

## Contact Information:

If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact the developer via email: mvinhle22@gmail.com.
